name: Bay Scallops with Spaghetti
method: Cook the spaghetti in a pot of salted water for 10 minutes. Drain and set aside.
Heat the butter in a large skillet.
Add the scallops in a single layer and brown for 2 minutes on medium heat.
Turn the scallops and brown the other side for 1 more minute.
Stir in the garlic, red pepper flakes, and wine and cook for 1 minute. Be sure not to overcook the scallops.
Season with salt, pepper, and the juice of half a lemon.
Stir the spaghetti into the skillet and combine it with the scallops.
Simmer for 2 minutes and top with the grated cheese.
